commands.summary: Excluded Git, .next, data, test artifacts, env, keys, credentials, and logs; node_modules junction only
pnpm dependency guard refused junctioned node_modules in noninteractive mode
Prettier reported 75 pre-existing files outside T023 allowed_files; assigned spec was clean

goalbuddy_receipt_v1.summary: Added and formatted the focused Pantry workflow E2E spec and created the audited secret-free mirror. Full formatting is blocked by 75 existing out-of-scope files. No server, Playwright, database, provider, Docker, device, backup, normal DB, or shared .next mutation began.
deviations: Disabled pnpm verify-deps-before-run only for the mirror so the junctioned node_modules would not be purged or reinstalled.
remaining_blockers: Mirror-wide formatting fails on 75 existing files outside allowed_files.
Remaining isolated gates were not run after the stop condition.
goalbuddy_receipt_v1.stopped_because: A required gate failed twice and remediation requires files outside allowed_files.
